violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary when putting on gloves.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc… were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The floors behind the fryers are due for deep cleaning.
General premises. — --Perimeter walls and roof did not effectively protect establishment from the weather and entry of insects, rodents, and other animals. The kitchen door was propped open.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The floor under the equipment and the floor in the walk in is due for deep cleaning.
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
